notes: NIKL balanced corpus — large and authoritative but requires institutional license review before use beyond personal research. Keep discovery_only until confirmed.

SUBTLEX-KO subtitle-derived word frequency list. CC BY 4.0 confirmed for the frequency list. Good proxy for informal/everyday Korean. Cleared for scoring; review before shipping any content citing it.
Korean Wiktionary — glosses and part-of-speech data. CC BY-SA 3.0 confirmed. Share-alike applies to derivatives; keep scoring_only until legal confirms shipped gloss strings are acceptable.
Korean tokenizer/NLP tool library — not a text corpus. Apache 2.0. Use for segmentation experiments only; contributes no scored content so domain_weight is 0.

Namu Wiki — large Korean community encyclopedia. CC BY-SA 2.0 KR confirmed. Good for culture and media domain coverage. Share-alike applies; keep scoring_only until legal confirms shipped excerpts are acceptable.
